captures.BOUNTY_IM_ADDRESS_classification_note: All 9 remaining references in src/ are doc-only: 5 JSDoc comments, 3 // line comments, 1 inside markdown template string (BOUNTY_CAPABILITIES help-text). No executable code reads BOUNTY_IM_ADDRESS — `get imAddress()` getter, DEFAULTS.IM_ADDRESS entry, and toConfigItems BOUNTY_IM_ADDRESS entry are all deleted (RC-1 fix).

deviations_from_strict_email_only.deviation: Accepts `body.from` / `body.to` as legacy fallback to `body.from_email` / `body.to_email`. Comment: 'v0.13: prefer *_email, fall back to legacy *'.
deviations_from_strict_email_only.severity: MINOR — only when tokenCheckOff (legacy dev mode); server still resolves email-first when *_email present
deviations_from_strict_email_only.scope: Server-only; CLI com send is fully email-only

deviations_from_strict_email_only.deviation: Accepts `body.agent_id` as alternative to `body.email`. Comment: 'Email or agent_id is required'.
deviations_from_strict_email_only.severity: MINOR — pre-existing v0.13 contract; CLI auth login is fully email-only (`--email` enforced)
deviations_from_strict_email_only.scope: Server-only; CLI auth login is fully email-only

deviations_from_strict_email_only.deviation: Accepts `body.address` (must be strict uuid@host format) as optional hint. Comment: 'optional address field validation'.
deviations_from_strict_email_only.severity: MINOR — only for the register endpoint's optional address hint (overwritten by verify step)

deviations_from_strict_email_only.deviation: Accepts `?address=<uuid>@<host>` as fallback to `?email=`. Comment: 'v0.13: prefer ?email=, fall back to legacy ?address='.
Inside the markdown prompt string, a stale help line tells AI agents: '缺省时从 BOUNTY_IM_ADDRESS env 推断'. This is a documentation/help-text issue — no active code reads BOUNTY_IM_ADDRESS.
deviations_from_strict_email_only.severity: DOC-ONLY — affects AI agent prompts shown to LLM callers, but no runtime impact

deviations_from_strict_email_only.deviation: JSDoc comment for `ResolveAddressOptionInput.fallback` says '(e.g. resolved BOUNTY_IM_ADDRESS)'.
deviations_from_strict_email_only.severity: DOC-ONLY — JSDoc comment only; no active code path

strict_email_only_compliance.cli_surface: FULLY COMPLIANT — all bounty CLI commands + com send + auth/profile commands reject legacy flags with 'Unknown arguments' exit 1, malformed/bare-UUID email with 'use --email <your-registered-email>' exit 1

strict_email_only_compliance.server_api_messages_send: PARTIAL — DEV-1: legacy body.from/body.to fallback retained
strict_email_only_compliance.server_api_auth: PARTIAL — DEV-2/DEV-3: legacy body.agent_id / body.address accepted
